queries.question: Give me the median age and population group for the most recent year for New York.
queries.sql: select MedianAge, PopulationGroup from AgeDemographics JOIN Cities ON AgeDemographics.CityId = Cities.id where Cities.CityName = 'New York' ORDER BY Year DESC LIMIT 1;
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/demographics#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/demographics/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?medianage ?populationgroup WHERE {
  ?agedemographics a :AgeDemographics .
  ?cities a :Cities .
  ?agedemographics p:hasCities ?cities .
  ?agedemographics p:MedianAge ?medianage .
  ?agedemographics p:PopulationGroup ?populationgroup .
  ?cities p:CityName ?cityname_f .
  ?agedemographics p:Year ?year_o .
  FILTER(?cityname_f = "New York")
}
ORDER BY DESC(?year_o)
LIMIT 1

queries.question: What is the age and population group for the most recent year for New York?
queries.sql: select AgeRange, PopulationGroup from AgeDemographics JOIN Cities ON AgeDemographics.CityId = Cities.id where Cities.CityName = 'New York' ORDER BY Year DESC LIMIT 1;
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/demographics#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/demographics/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?agerange ?populationgroup WHERE {
  ?agedemographics a :AgeDemographics .
  ?cities a :Cities .
  ?agedemographics p:hasCities ?cities .
  ?agedemographics p:AgeRange ?agerange .
  ?agedemographics p:PopulationGroup ?populationgroup .
  ?cities p:CityName ?cityname_f .
  ?agedemographics p:Year ?year_o .
  FILTER(?cityname_f = "New York")
}
ORDER BY DESC(?year_o)
LIMIT 1

ambiguous_dsl.question: What is the age and population group for the most recent year for New York?
ambiguous_dsl.choice_dsl:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/demographics#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/demographics/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
CHOICE vague {
  component: { SELECT ?medianage ?populationgroup WHERE {
  ?agedemographics a :AgeDemographics .
  ?cities a :Cities .
  ?agedemographics p:hasCities ?cities .
  ?agedemographics p:MedianAge ?medianage .
  ?agedemographics p:PopulationGroup ?populationgroup .
  ?cities p:CityName ?cityname_f .
  ?agedemographics p:Year ?year_o .
  FILTER(?cityname_f = "New York")
}
ORDER BY DESC(?year_o)
LIMIT 1 }
  component_2: { SELECT ?agerange ?populationgroup WHERE {
  ?agedemographics a :AgeDemographics .
  ?cities a :Cities .
  ?agedemographics p:hasCities ?cities .
  ?agedemographics p:AgeRange ?agerange .
  ?agedemographics p:PopulationGroup ?populationgroup .
  ?cities p:CityName ?cityname_f .
  ?agedemographics p:Year ?year_o .
  FILTER(?cityname_f = "New York")
}
ORDER BY DESC(?year_o)
LIMIT 1 }
}
